;<span id="Computational_spaced_repetition">computational spaced repetition</span>
:approach to [[Glossary:Spaced_repetition|spaced repetition]] in which [[Glossary:Optimum_interval|optimum intervals]] are calculated with the help of a computer on the basis of the past record of learning. [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]] was the first computer program to implement rudimentary spaced repetition algorithm in [https://super-memory.com/articles/soft/sms.htm 1987]. Currently, SuperMemo employs the [[Glossary:DSR_model|DSR model of memory]] to predict when [[Glossary:item|items]] are likely to be forgotten.
